title: Operation Epic Fury Begins
keyEvents: US-Israel launch surprise strikes on 50+ sites across Iran
Khamenei killed in Tehran bunker strike on Pasteur Street compound
IRGC headquarters destroyed in coordinated bombing
Iran air defenses 40% destroyed in first wave
Trump announces 'Operation Epic Fury' via Truth Social at 2:30am
168 killed when Israeli strike hits Shajareh Tayyebeh girls' school in Minab

title: Iran Retaliates
keyEvents: Iran launches massive missile and drone barrages at Israel, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar
Iranian state media confirms Khamenei dead — 40 days of mourning declared
Iran closes the Strait of Hormuz — 20% of global oil transit halted
1,000+ total targets hit across Iran; Trump claims 48 Iranian leaders killed
Pentagon confirms 3 US service members killed in action

title: Hezbollah Opens Northern Front
keyEvents: Hezbollah launches 200+ rockets into northern Israel from Lebanon
Israel begins retaliatory strikes on Beirut southern suburbs
Iranian ballistic missiles strike US base at Al Udeid, Qatar — intercepted
Global oil markets panic; Brent crude jumps $4 overnight
UN Security Council emergency session — Russia and China block ceasefire resolution

title: Kuwait Drone Strike
keyEvents: 6 US troops killed in coordinated drone strike on Camp Arifjan, Kuwait
Pro-Iran militias in Iraq launch rocket attacks on Ain al-Asad Air Base
Second wave of US strikes targets Iranian missile production facilities
Iranian navy attempts to mine Strait of Hormuz approaches
First US combat footage released by Pentagon

title: Escalation Across Region
keyEvents: US strikes expand to Iranian port facilities at Bandar Abbas
Houthi missiles target US carrier group in Red Sea — all intercepted
Israel ground incursion into southern Lebanon begins
Iranian diaspora protests erupt in London, Berlin, Los Angeles
Gas prices in US jump 30 cents overnight

title: Pentagon: $11.3B in 6 Days
keyEvents: Pentagon briefing reveals $11.3B spent in first six days of operations
Congress demands emergency briefing — administration cites War Powers Act
Iranian cyber attacks hit US financial institutions and power grid
IAEA reports Iranian nuclear facility at Natanz severely damaged
Civilian death toll in Iran passes 380 according to HRANA

title: Hormuz Crisis — Oil Past $90
keyEvents: Oil surges past $90 as Strait of Hormuz remains closed
Two commercial tankers struck by Iranian mines near Fujairah
US Navy minesweepers deployed to clear Strait approaches
Pentagon announces 14,000 additional troops deploying to region
Iran claims to have shot down 3 US drones over Persian Gulf

title: Lebanon Front Widens
keyEvents: Israeli ground offensive pushes 10km into southern Lebanon
Hezbollah anti-tank missiles destroy 4 Israeli armored vehicles
US begins B-2 bomber strikes on underground Iranian facilities
Pentagon requests emergency supplemental funding from Congress
First ICRC report: hospitals in Tehran overwhelmed

title: Civilian Toll Mounts
keyEvents: Strikes on Isfahan hit residential neighborhoods — 80+ civilians killed
International Women's Day protests worldwide demand ceasefire
Iran fires medium-range ballistic missiles at US base in Bahrain
US stock market drops 4% on war and oil fears
Doctors Without Borders reports critical medicine shortages in Iran

title: Minab School Strike Confirmed
keyEvents: Full details emerge of Minab school strike: 168 children killed on Day 1
Photos of Shajareh Tayyebeh girls' school rubble go viral worldwide
Multiple countries recall ambassadors from Washington and Tel Aviv
Pope Francis calls for immediate ceasefire in special address
US domestic anti-war protests begin in 40+ cities

title: Global Backlash Grows
keyEvents: EU Parliament passes non-binding resolution condemning strikes
Turkey closes airspace to US military overflights
Iran militia proxies attack oil facilities in Kirkuk, Iraq
Pentagon confirms 12th US service member killed — IED in Iraq
HRANA documents 840+ civilian deaths with names and locations

title: Strikes on Iranian Infrastructure
keyEvents: US strikes target Iranian power grid and communications infrastructure
Rolling blackouts reported across Tehran, Isfahan, Shiraz
Iranian internet goes dark — near-total information blackout
Red Cross convoy denied access to bombed areas in Khuzestan
China announces $2B emergency humanitarian aid package to Iran

title: Humanitarian Crisis Deepens
keyEvents: UNHCR reports 500,000+ internally displaced in Iran
Iranian hospitals running on generator power — fuel running low
Hezbollah rocket kills 8 Israeli civilians in Haifa
US Marines land at Bandar Abbas port to secure shipping lanes
Pentagon spending rate: ~$2.5B per day

title: Two Weeks of War
keyEvents: Two-week mark: 2,510 killed in Iran, 14 US troops dead
Oil approaches $100 — gas prices in US average $4.80/gallon
Iran's acting Supreme Leader vows 'resistance until victory'
Russia begins military exercises near Azerbaijan border
US House votes 218-212 to authorize 60-day military operations

title: Oil Breaks $100
keyEvents: Brent crude breaks $100/barrel for first time since 2022
Global recession fears spike — Dow drops 800 points
Iran launches ballistic missile at Israeli port of Eilat — partially intercepted
Pentagon announces additional carrier strike group deploying
Anti-war march in Washington draws 200,000+

title: Deepening Air Campaign
keyEvents: US begins 'Phase 2' targeting Iranian industrial capacity
Strikes hit petrochemical facilities at Mahshahr
Iranian IRGC commander killed in targeted strike in Syria
16th US service member killed — helicopter crash in Gulf
India and Japan urge diplomatic solution as energy costs soar

title: HRANA: 3,114 Killed
keyEvents: HRANA documents 3,114 total killed in Iran — names published online
At least 1,420 confirmed civilians among the dead
Pentagon requests $200B emergency war supplemental from Congress
Iran fires cruise missiles at Saudi oil facility at Ras Tanura
Global food prices spike 15% on shipping disruption fears

title: $200B War Request
keyEvents: Pentagon formally submits $200B supplemental war funding request
Congressional debate erupts — progressives demand withdrawal
12 Republican senators break ranks, question escalation
Iran's internet partially restored — videos of destruction flood social media
European gas prices jump 40% on LNG supply fears

title: Environmental Catastrophe
keyEvents: Massive oil spill in Persian Gulf from struck Iranian terminal
Environmental groups warn of ecological disaster across Gulf coastlines
Strikes hit water treatment plants — 2M+ without clean water in Khuzestan
18th US service member killed in mortar attack in Iraq
Chinese and Russian warships enter Gulf of Oman for 'monitoring'

title: Three Weeks Mark
keyEvents: Three weeks of war — $60.8B spent, no end in sight
US Gas prices hit $5.20/gallon national average
Trump approval rating drops to 38% — lowest of presidency
NATO allies refuse to join combat operations
Iran's acting government signals willingness for back-channel talks

title: Nowruz Under Bombs
keyEvents: Iranian New Year (Nowruz) — strikes continue through the holiday
Worldwide Nowruz vigils held for Iranian civilians
US strikes hit Isfahan steel production complex
Nuclear enrichment facility at Fordow struck with bunker busters
19th US service member killed — anti-ship missile hits patrol boat

title: Nuclear Sites Targeted
keyEvents: Massive B-2 strikes on Natanz underground centrifuge halls
IAEA warns of potential radiological contamination from strikes
Environmental monitoring stations detect elevated radiation near Natanz
Global protests reach largest scale — 5M+ march across 80 countries
Iran's Guardian Council declares 'sacred defense' mobilization

title: Industrial Destruction Campaign
keyEvents: Strikes destroy Esfahan Steel Company — Iran's largest steel plant
Mobarakeh Steel complex targeted with precision munitions
Pentagon declares 'industrial disarmament phase' of operations
20th US service member killed in drone attack on convoy in Syria
European automakers halt production citing steel supply disruption

title: Global Protests Surge
keyEvents: Largest anti-war protest in US since Iraq War — 500,000 in DC
Strikes hit Khuzestan Steel Company facilities
Iranian refugees flooding into Turkey and Iraq — 100,000+ displaced across borders
UN General Assembly passes ceasefire resolution 143-5
Federal Reserve issues emergency economic guidance on oil shock

title: Academic Targets Hit
keyEvents: Strikes hit Iran University of Science and Technology (IUST) physics department
Pentagon claims IUST housed nuclear weapons research program
Academic community worldwide condemns targeting of universities
21st US service member killed — rocket attack on Green Zone, Baghdad
Oil industry analysts predict $120+ if war continues through April

title: Mobarakeh Steel Destroyed
keyEvents: Satellite imagery confirms Mobarakeh Steel complex completely destroyed
Iran's steel production capacity reduced by estimated 70%
Strikes on Bandar Khamir port facilities in Hormozgan province
Global steel prices surge 25% on supply fears
South Korea and Japan announce emergency oil reserve releases

title: Khuzestan Devastation
keyEvents: Sustained strikes on Khuzestan province industrial and oil infrastructure
Ahvaz residents report constant bombardment for 72 hours
22nd US service member killed — Houthi anti-ship missile in Red Sea
Iran's oil export capacity effectively reduced to zero
IMF warns of 'severe global economic disruption' if war continues

title: Bandar Khamir Strikes
keyEvents: Further strikes on Bandar Khamir destroy remaining port infrastructure
Pentagon announces war costs have exceeded $100B
Iran's acting FM appeals directly to US public in video address
Bipartisan group of 40 senators demand ceasefire negotiations
UK Parliament debates withdrawal of intelligence support

title: Houthis Threaten Intervention
keyEvents: Houthi leadership declares 'full war footing' in solidarity with Iran
Houthi missiles and drones target multiple commercial vessels in Red Sea
23rd US service member killed in Houthi attack on destroyer escort
Global shipping insurance rates triple for Persian Gulf and Red Sea
Oil hits $116/barrel — highest since 2008 financial crisis

title: One Month of War
keyEvents: One month mark: 3,461 killed in Iran, 23 US troops dead
Total cost: $114.8B in 30 days — nearly $4B per day
Iran's military capacity estimated at 35% of pre-war levels
No ceasefire in sight — Pentagon plans operations through summer
Global economic damage estimated at $800B+ from oil disruption alone

title: G7 Crisis Response
keyEvents: Continued strikes on Iranian military targets
Hormuz tolls continue — shipping rerouting
G7 leaders meet on crisis response
Oil prices volatile around $115-118
Kuwaiti tanker Al Salmi ablaze off Dubai

title: Oil Hits $118 — Record Surge
keyEvents: Kuwait oil infrastructure targeted by Iranian proxy strikes
US gas prices approaching $4/gallon nationally
Pentagon casualty transparency questioned
Tanker hit near Dubai
Brent crude surges above $118 — record 59% monthly gain

title: Pentagon Hiding Casualties
keyEvents: Intercept reports Pentagon hiding US casualty numbers
Pentagon sent outdated statements — undercounts
One unnamed US soldier died in non-combat death
Iran-Oman talks on Hormuz monitoring reported
Oil prices pull back from highs

title: Tehran Bridge & Pasteur Institute Destroyed
keyEvents: MAJOR ESCALATION — Trump strikes Tehran highway Bridge B-1
Pasteur Institute (leading public health institution) destroyed
Trump vows to take Iran back to the Stone Ages
Stocks drop 1.5%, partially recover on Hormuz talk rumors
Brent crude $111.69

title: F-15E Shot Down — WSO Missing
keyEvents: F-15E Strike Eagle shot down over western Iran (494th FS) — pilot rescued, WSO missing
A-10 Warthog hit by Iranian air defenses in separate incident
7 total manned aircraft lost in war, 16+ MQ-9 Reaper drones lost
Italy sends naval forces to Gulf. Syria reports explosions in Damascus
Pentagon requests $1.1T defense budget + $350B reconciliation
Brent $112.42
